name: KABALE IGNATIUS MUKUNTO
summary: A mature, enthusiastic, self-driven and hardworking person ready to work in challenging environments. Goal-oriented and committed to attainment of results with minimum supervision. An ardent reader and researcher willing to take on new and challenging academic explorations.

experience.title: Coordinator, Lecturer
experience.company: Dag Hammarskjöld Institute for Peace and Conflict Studies
experience.description: Teaching duties, invigilation of examinations; Currently involved in co-teaching courses: Introduction to Human Rights; Conflict Prevention and Management; Political Systems and Institutions of Governance; Democratization Process and Gender; Human Rights and Socioeconomics; Housing, Dislocation and Evictions. Coordinating courses under human rights, governance and peacebuilding specialization; Co-supervise theses and dissertations; Assess students on a continuous basis, set and mark assignments; Undertake original and collaborative research; Develop new and advanced courses; Participate in administration of other academic affairs of the unit; Current Research Interests: Urban Conflicts; Ethnicity and Governance; Indigenous (African) Knowledge Systems; Informal Settlements and Social Exclusion: Youth and Conflict; Human Rights and Socioeconomics.

education.institution: University for Peace, San Jose, Costa Rica

education.degree: Bcom (Honours) in Conflict Resolution and Peace Studies (Upper Second Class)
education.institution: University of KwaZulu Natal, Durban, South Africa

education.degree: Diploma in Peacebuilding and Conflict Transformation (Class A)
Certificate in Accounting and Business Studies (CABS)
education.institution: Zambia Institute of Business Studies & Industrial Practice (ZIBSIP), Kitwe, Zambia

skills: Good Oral and Written skills (ability to read, write and speak English)
Ability to apply technical knowledge in public sphere
Good Pedagogical, Analytical and Communication Skills
Ability to operate in multicultural setting
Computer literate – Microsoft Word, PowerPoint, Outlook, Excel etc.
